items.title: McDonald’s Corporation (MCD): A Bull Case Theory
items.description: We came across a bullish thesis on McDonald’s Corporation on Phaetrix Investing’s Substack by Phaetrix. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on MCD. McDonald’s Corporation’s share was trading at $315.00 as of January 30th. MCD’s trailing and forward P/E were 25.70 and 22.62 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. McDonald’s Corporation owns, operates, and franchises restaurants […]

items.title: Lamb Weston: Turnaround Opportunity As Fast-Food Headwinds Mask Improving Fundamentals
Constantino Claims Record for Largest Congressional Announcement Crowd in U.S. History
items.description: AMSTERDAM, N.Y., Feb. 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Anthony Constantino’s campaign for Congress in NY-21 claims it calculated 3,000+ people in attendance making it the largest crowd size for a Congressional announcement ever. “We ran out of parking,” said Campaign Manager Lenny Roudik. “That was quite surprising as Anthony’s parking lot, which supports two factory buildings, is huge.” Enormous lines queued up separately for 1,000 hoodies, Neapolitan pizza, McDonalds, baccala fritters cooked by a

items.title: McDonald's Tests Premium Caviar And Spicy Flavors To Engage Customers
items.description: McDonald's (NYSE:MCD) is introducing its first McNugget Caviar kits with Paramount Caviar as a special promotion linked to Valentine's Day. McDonald's Canada is rolling out a limited-time collaboration with Frank's RedHot to add new spicy items to its menu. For a company built on mass market favorites like burgers, fries, and McNuggets, NYSE:MCD continues to look for fresh ways to keep customers engaged. The caviar pairing reflects the current appetite for food experiences that feel premium...

items.title: Why McDonald's (MCD) Outpaced the Stock Market Today
items.description: In the most recent trading session, McDonald's (MCD) closed at $318.53, indicating a +1.12% shift from the previous trading day.
